items.title: Schedule urgent catch-up with Gabriel (Engramme) on new term sheet before they sign
items.context: Email from gabriel@engramme.com on Jun 2: 'We received a new term sheet. Before signing term sheets, we wanted to see if there's a way for us to work together. Do you have a few minutes to catch up?'

items.title: Respond to Barak (Opti) with ballpark commitment amount for $15-20M round
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on Jun 3: 'It will help me make the internal process quicker if you could share a ballpark amount of what you'd like to commit if we end up with a round of about $15-$20m at $75m-$90m pre money valuation'

items.title: Follow up with Barak (Opti) for post-board meeting updates early next week
items.context: Email from barakp@opti.ai on Jun 3: 'We actually have our board meeting tomorrow, so I think I'll have concrete updates to share by early next week'

items.title: Schedule catch-up call with Boris (Blast Security) for Friday or Monday morning
items.context: Email from borisv@blast.security on Jun 4: 'I would love to catch up either Friday or Monday morning. Please let me know which day works better for you, and I will send a calendar invitation.' Richie had reached out about the round Boris is pulling together.

items.title: Send intro to Banxware for Simone (Prism Layer)
items.context: Email from logan@fin.capital on May 31: 'On the company side, will send you an intro to Banxware and will see if SumUp is interested in meeting' — commitment made after in-person meeting with Simone.

items.title: Check with SumUp if interested in meeting Prism Layer
items.context: Email from logan@fin.capital on May 31: 'will see if SumUp is interested in meeting — they're a scaled / late stage company and tend to build in-house'
